about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: I'm a Full-Stack Developer with hands-on experience building scalable, well-structured solutions. I apply patterns like Atomic Design and Clean Architecture to build robust, maintainable applications.
about.paragraph2: I'm currently in my 4th semester of Software Analysis and Development, focused on UI/UX best practices and code quality. I'm always looking to grow and deliver clean, efficient, high-impact software.

items.title: Full Stack Developer
bullets: Full stack web development with React, Node.js, and TypeScript.
Scalable REST APIs on the back-end with Clean Architecture and DDD.
Front-end structured with Atomic Design for reusable, consistent components.

items.title: Mobile Developer
bullets: Mobile app with React Native and Expo for farm workers to report issues in the field.
Simple interface designed for users with low digital literacy.
Data saved offline on the device and sent to headquarters when internet returned.
QR Code login, API integration, and optimized authentication flow.

items.title: Technologist in Systems Analysis and Development
Technology Course, Full Stack JS Training
Cisco IT Essentials
bullets: Score above 75% in the course, earning the Cisco merit letter.
